user_query: What emotion does Calvin mention feeling when he sees the relief of someone whose car he fixed?

selected_nodes.text: Calvin feels a sense of achievement and relaxation similar to meditating when fixing cars.
selected_nodes.reasoning: Calvin mentions feeling a sense of achievement and relaxation when fixing cars, which relates to the relief of someone whose car he fixed.

selected_nodes.text: Calvin expressed satisfaction in bringing something back to life, referring to an opportunity.
selected_nodes.reasoning: Calvin expresses satisfaction in bringing something back to life, which aligns with the emotion felt when helping someone with their car.

selected_nodes.text: Calvin finds working on cars to be a calming and head-clearing activity.
selected_nodes.reasoning: Calvin finds working on cars calming, which connects to the emotional relief experienced by others when their car is fixed.

selected_nodes.text: Calvin recognizes that working on cars can be a real escape from reality and understands the feeling of doing what you love for a living.
selected_nodes.reasoning: Calvin recognizes the escape from reality that comes with working on cars, which can relate to the relief felt by someone whose car he has fixed.
